evidence: standards/enterprise/data-lifecycle.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A retention extension binds exact purpose, class, store, legal or product basis, owner, expiry, and removal trigger; permanent-by-default retention is not an exception.
statement: Every persisted, queued, cached, indexed, or offline product-data set MUST have a declared purpose-bound retention duration or terminal event and an accountable deletion owner.
